Above Their Average
📈 Biggest Jump · This Week
No standout yet — takes 5+ logged this week above a rep's own weekly average.
Score = follow-ups per active week × (0.5 + 0.5 × completion). Active weeks are weeks with at least one log, so off weeks never count against a rep. Qualify: logged in the last 21 days, ≥ {{ otlFloor }} active weeks, ≥ 8 follow-ups, and ≥ 50% completion.

Wasted-Call Rate
{{ scCard.wastedPct }}
{{ scCard.wastedSub }}
Wasted-Call Rate = share of logged calls that were "wasn't in / left my card" drop-bys with no real contact. A high rate is a routing and appointment-setting problem, not an effort problem — the rep is working, but not reaching decision-makers.

⚙ Admin

{{ adminGateMsg }}

{{ adminError }}

1 · Upload open & closed quotes

Use these buttons for all quote uploads — open quotes (Quote Log) and closed quotes from Fenevision. Use the green button for the 13-month rep sales report (the sales half of rep/branch grades). The app auto-detects the file type.

{{ dataMeta }}
Uploads add to what's already loaded — upload each facility's Glass and Metal files one at a time and they accumulate. Re-uploading a quote updates it. To start over, · .

2 · Upload call logs (from another app)

Weekly call-log export (.xlsx) for reps still using the other app. Rows merge into the Call Log and are de-duped against calls already logged (by date, rep, customer & notes). Rep names are normalized (e.g. Clark Haas → Clarke Haas).

2 · Cloud sharing · {{ cloudStatusLabel }}

This is what lets reps see your uploads on their phones. Enter the sync password you set on Netlify (the SYNC_KEY environment variable). Once saved, every upload above is published to all reps automatically — they just open the site, no upload on their end.

{{ cloudPushMsg }}

3 · Upload follow-up log (daily, optional)

Upload the logged follow-ups exported from Google Sheets (.xlsx). Only new follow-ups are added — anything already imported or already logged in-app is skipped, so you can upload the full export any time without creating duplicates. Refreshes the Logged Follow-Ups tab and reconciles it below.

{{ logUploadMsg }}
{{ r.label }} {{ r.value }}

4 · Export logged follow-ups

Download every logged follow-up (with answers) as a CSV. {{ loggedCountNote }}

5 · Google Sheet sync · {{ syncStatus }}

Set up once so every in-app follow-up also posts into your Google Form's responses sheet. In the form editor: ⋮ → Get pre-filled link, fill in every field with any sample value, click Get link, and paste it here.

{{ fullSetupMsg }}
